content: Hi, I'm Jane Doe, I need my records.

Hello Jane! I can certainly help you with that. To ensure your privacy and security, I need to verify your identity. Could you please provide me with your date of birth and either your medical record number (MRN) or the ZIP code on file?

If you need any assistance finding this information, feel free to let me know!

I'm sorry, Jane, but the information you provided didn't match our records. Could you please double-check the date of birth and ZIP code and try again? If you're having trouble, I can assist you with finding the correct information.

Thank you, Jane! Your identity has been confirmed. How would you like to receive your records? You can choose to have them sent to your email or I can read specific details to you over the phone.

If you'd like to have them emailed, could you please provide me with your email address?
Great, can you send my full record to me?

Sure thing, Jane! I'll need your email address to send the full record to you. Could you please provide that?

Also, just to confirm, I'll be sending the full record, which includes all your health information. Is that correct?
